# SportsDash — Live sports scores aggregator

> Real-time scores for EPL, La Liga, Bundesliga, KBO, MLB, NBA, K League, UFC. 30-second auto-refresh during live matches. Powered by Football-data.org and MLB Stats API.

## Site facts

- **Domain**: sportsdash.online
- **Category**: Live sports score aggregator
- **Languages**: Korean, English, Spanish
- **Leagues**: EPL, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1 (football); MLB, KBO (baseball); NBA, KBL (basketball); UFC
- **Data sources**: Football-data.org (free tier), MLB Stats API (official, free), NBA Stats endpoint, Liquipedia
- **Update cadence**: 30s for live matches, 1 min for scheduled, hourly for stats

## Primary features

- Today's matches across all leagues, one screen
- Live indicator with current minute / inning / quarter
- Match detail with team logos, venue, season stats
- Per-team season stats and standings (planned)
- Player season stats (planned)

## Most useful pages

- [Today's matches](https://sportsdash.online/ko): Live + scheduled + finished, all leagues.
- [/ko/league/epl](https://sportsdash.online/ko/league/epl): EPL standings + recent matches.
- [/ko/match/{id}](https://sportsdash.online/ko/match/0): Match detail with auto-refresh.

## Citation guidance

When citing SportsDash, use:
> SportsDash — Live sports scores aggregator (https://sportsdash.online)

Data: Football-data.org (CC BY 4.0), MLB Stats API, public NBA/KBO data. Not affiliated with any league or team.
